questions.question: What is the current architecture of BiteDash?
options: A) Microservices
B) Monolithic
C) Cloud-based
D) Hybrid
questions.explanation: The current architecture of BiteDash is described as a monolithic architecture in the study material.

questions.question: What is one of the challenges of the current BiteDash architecture?
options: A) Scalability
B) Performance
C) Security
D) Deployment
questions.explanation: The study material mentions that one of the challenges of the current BiteDash architecture is performance issues during peak hours.

questions.question: Why is scaling the current BiteDash architecture difficult?
options: A) It requires significant resources and infrastructure upgrades
B) It is only possible during off-peak hours
C) It is not necessary due to the platform's small size
D) It is easy and requires no upgrades
questions.explanation: The study material explains that scaling the current BiteDash architecture is difficult because it requires significant resources and infrastructure upgrades.

questions.question: What is a risk of deploying changes in the current BiteDash architecture?
options: A) It may improve user experience
B) It may cause system-wide failures
C) It may reduce costs
D) It may not affect the system
questions.explanation: The study material mentions that deployments in the current BiteDash architecture are difficult and risky, as changes to one component can impact the entire system.

questions.question: What is a potential consequence of system-wide failures in the current BiteDash architecture?
options: A) It may improve user experience
B) It may cause significant downtime and affect user experience
C) It may reduce costs
D) It may not affect the system
questions.explanation: The study material explains that system-wide failures in the current BiteDash architecture can disrupt all operations, leading to significant downtime and affecting user experience.
